name: East Recreation Center
description: East Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Winona, MN. There is 1 indoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Goodview Outdoor Courts
description: Goodview Outdoor Courts is a place to play pickleball in Goodview, MN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Winona Bluff Pickleball Club
description: 5 temperature controlled indoor courts with an outdoor surface and nice lobby area.

name: Winona Indoor Tennis Center
description: Winona Indoor Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Winona, MN. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms. You can reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: Group play is also available Monday-Friday mornings.
fees: Fee required — PB members pay $5 per 2-hour session. Non-PB members pay $10 per 2-hour session.
